{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320180518349EB9DBF2BC517A5D2B"}"},"total":320},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7274317715794297611","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"人设真的太好看了，就是我觉得主角好像没有摆烂，相比之下，他更像那些人的白月光人设，文笔不错，剧情跌宕起伏，系统的好坏，主角是否忘记了什么，那些被主角轮回时拯救的人恢复记忆后听到系统的话后想要救主角，主角是否需要被拯救？","text_exts":[{"e":38,"s":35,"text":"白月光","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%99%BD%E6%9C%88%E5%85%89&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774001118517A5D2B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227274317715794297611%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227193630758815140925%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%99%BD%E6%9C%88%E5%85%89%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1693684691,"group_id":"7193630758815140925","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"泪儿流下，梦儿绚烂，愿在梦中的你，能够不在流泪哦~","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9soXHJdYa1nqRhwujGp9Jpq2wS1qO9RGbkraWRqA90S","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/28978ff608984baaa5d5d5957453c83f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532661&x-signature=xNpV1CS6MEJsyONRTg97DV3HIbQ%3D","user_id":"3081286544261775","user_name":"缘梦鸾华"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3081286544261775","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7193630758815140925","book_info":{"abstract":"综漫，男主无cp，主柯南，涉及柯南+文野+咒回
主角刚开始摆烂但便当们自觉被踹文，有万人迷设定，有系统。
————————
泷夜一被系统拉着做完了各大拯救世界的任务后终于准备携系统一起在度假世界里退休养老，结果这傻系统带着他来到了遍地惨案的柯学世界……
泷夜一：行吧，你开心就好……等等，刚才过去的那个墨镜白毛大高个是不是有点眼熟？
退休假期时长是一百世轮回，泷夜一就在这大杂烩的世界里度过了九十九世。期间他救过许多人，也杀过许多人。
这次是第一百世，也是最后一次轮回了，而他只想摆烂。
但是……他这一世的身份背景有点复杂麻烦不说，那群理应什么都不记得的人貌似开始不对劲起来了？
